positive: A minimalist, abstract depiction of a cosmic forest. Giant, stylized, bioluminescent mushrooms and crystalline trees are rooted in a dark void. The composition should feature strong vertical elements and a central cluster of glowing life. Palette consists of deep indigo, electric cyan, vibrant lavender, and ethereal gold accents. Emphasize silhouettes, clean lines, and negative space. Style: Japanese woodblock print meets ethereal psychedelia, high contrast, graphic, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Dramatic volumetric lighting emanating from the flora.
negative: blurry, grain, noise, watermark, text, logo, trademark, wires, cables, poor anatomy, messy, realistic photorealism, low detail
